step_rationale: Fibrinolysis product; marker of thrombin activity and fibrin turnover.
mechanism: Fragment E released during fibrin degradation reflects active coagulation and fibrinolytic turnover in the coronary thrombus.

references.title: A comparative evaluation of assays for markers of activated coagulation and/or fibrinolysis: thrombin-antithrombin complex, D-dimer and fibrinogen/fibrin fragment E antigen.
